about.title: About us
about.desc: The Surfer Surf Camps in Sri Lanka fully owned by a local surfer who was born and grew up in Weligama, Sri Lanka. Located in the heart of the surfing area in Weligama, with nine to ten surf spots within a five to ten minute Tuk Tuk ride.

faq.heading: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you book your stay with The Surfer.

items.question: 01) Worth to try a surf camp?
items.answer: Looking for an epic adventure? Look no further than Surf Camp Sri Lanka! This experience is totally worth it. Not only will you get to improve your surfing skills with video analysis and expert coaching, but you’ll also meet tons of like-minded travelers. Plus, you won’t have to worry about a thing – the camp takes care of everything from food to surfing, yoga to safety. So, if you’re traveling solo or just looking for a new challenge, Surfcamp is the perfect choice. Don’t miss out on this amazing opportunity to catch the best waves, surf conditions and make new friends!

items.question: 02) Does Sri Lanka has good surfing?
items.answer: Are you a surfer looking for a new adventure? Well, let me tell you, Sri Lanka is the place to be! With its beautiful beaches and consistent waves, Sri Lanka is a surfer’s paradise. Whether you’re a beginner or a pro, there are plenty of spots to catch some waves. From the famous Southwest coast Weligama to East coast Arugambay, you’ll find a variety of breaks to suit your style. So grab your board and head to Sri Lanka for an unforgettable surfing experience in Sri Lanka.

items.question: 03) Do you need a wet suit to surf in Sri Lanka?
items.answer: If you’re planning a trip to Sri Lanka, you might be wondering if you need to pack a wet suit. Well, we’ve got some good news for you – you can leave it at home! The water temperature in Sri Lanka is warm, so you won’t need to worry about getting chilly while you catch some waves. Plus, who wants to deal with the hassle of putting on and taking off a wet suit anyway? So pack your board shorts and sunscreen, and get ready for some epic surf sessions in the warm waters of Sri Lanka.

items.question: 04) Are Sri Lanka surfing spots crowded?
items.answer: Looking for a chill surf vacation without the crowds? Look no further than Sri Lanka! Our surf camp in Weligama is run by a local who knows all the best spots. And the best part? We’ll take you to the hidden gems that not many people know about. No need to worry about fighting for waves or feeling like you’re in a surf competition. Just relax, catch some waves, and enjoy the beautiful scenery. Book with us and experience the uncrowded surfing spots of Sri Lanka.

items.question: 05) Are you wondering if you're too old to learn to surf?
items.answer: Let me tell you, age is just a number! Whether you’re 26 or 66, you can still catch some waves and have a blast. Don’t let anyone tell you otherwise. And if you’re looking for the perfect board to get started, we’ve got you covered. Our beginner-friendly surfboards are designed to help you learn quickly and easily. So, what are you waiting for? It’s never too late to learn something new. Book a surf trip with us in one of our surf camp Sri Lanka. We are also a yoga retreat and we offer daily breakfast all inclusive.

items.question: 06) Which months are best to surfing in Sri Lanka south west coast?
items.answer: If you’re a surfing enthusiast, you’ll definitely want to check out Sri Lanka’s south west coast. And if you’re wondering when the best time to go is, we’ve got you covered. The ideal months for surfing in this area are from October to the end of April. That’s right, you’ve got a solid six months to catch some waves and soak up the sun. So grab your board and get ready for an unforgettable experience. With warm waters and consistent swells, you won’t want to miss out on this surfing paradise.

items.question: 07) Is Sri Lanka best for beginner surfers?
items.answer: If you’re a beginner looking for the perfect place to catch some waves, look no further than surfing in Sri Lanka. Trust us, it’s 100% the best spot for newbies compared to anywhere else in the world. And The surf beach in Weligama is the ultimate place to learn to surf. With a 2-3 km long sandy coastline and gentle waves that won’t knock you off your board, you’ll be shredding in no time. Plus, there are no dangerous currents or reefs to worry about. So grab your board and head to Weligama for the ultimate surfing experience!

sections.moroccoNoteHeading: About The Surfer Surfstyle Surf Camp
sections.styleCampNote: Our trusted partner camp in Tamraght offers the perfect mix of consistent waves, laid-back Moroccan living, and a friendly community vibe. Guests enjoy expert-led surf sessions, optional yoga, cozy beachfront accommodation, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Whether you’re chasing your first wave or refining your skills, The Surfer Surfstyle Surf Camp delivers an unforgettable surf experience — all with the same quality and passion you know from The Surfer.

cards.body1: Join us at the ultimate destination for surf enthusiasts. Experience the thrill of riding the waves and enjoy the serene beauty of the ocean.
Feel the magic of surfing as the sun sets over the horizon. Our guided sunset sessions are a perfect way to end your beach day.
An independent retreat for the dedicated surfer. Own dedicated location in Weligama with a rooftop infinity pool, sea-view rooftop dining, and its own schedule of sessions.
Take your skills to the next level with our advanced surf training camp. Designed for serious surfers seeking to improve technique and form.

comfortableStays.title: Stay in Style, the Island Way
comfortableStays.intro: Whether you're a solo surfer, a beach-loving couple, or a group of wave-chasers — we've got the perfect spot for you. Think breezy rooms, tropical touches, and all the essentials for a chill stay just steps from the sea. Laid-back comfort meets island style — because everyone deserves to sleep easy after a day in the surf.

rooms.title: Private Triple Room Ensuite

aboutSoulSurfer.heading: What is Soul Surfer Camp?
paragraphs: Soul Surfer Camp is an independent boutique surf retreat in Weligama, located just a 20-second walk from the beach and only 5 to 10 minutes' walk from the city center.
Designed for comfort, style, and easy island living, the camp offers upscale private rooms, twin rooms, and mixed dormitory rooms with ensuite bathrooms.
The camp has its own dedicated location, its own daily schedule of surf sessions and activities, and runs entirely independently while still carrying the original The Surfer camp vibe.

Guests can relax between surf sessions at the rooftop restaurant with sea views or enjoy the rooftop infinity pool overlooking the ocean. Soul Surfer Camp is the perfect choice for travelers who want a more boutique, comfortable surf camp experience in Weligama, with great vibes, beautiful views, and easy access to the beach and town.

comfortableStaysSoul.title: Rooms at Soul Surfer Camp
comfortableStaysSoul.intro: Every room at Soul Surfer Camp is designed with boutique-style comfort and easy island living in mind, whether you are sharing a dorm, enjoying a private hideaway, or staying in a twin room with a travel buddy. Rest well between surf sessions and enjoy the full retreat experience with our rooftop restaurant overlooking the sea and rooftop infinity pool with panoramic ocean views.

beach.title: The Surfer Beach Camp Weligama
beach.subtitle: Beachfront surf camp Sri Lanka — your ultimate beach surf camp experience

lifeAtSurfCamp.title: Life At The Surfer Beach Camp
paragraphs: Located right on the golden shores of Weligama, The Surfer Beach Camp blends epic waves, tropical living, and good energy into one unforgettable experience. With over ten years of surf hospitality and six consecutive Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice Awards, this is more than just a surf camp—it’s a home away from home.

Every day is shaped by the rhythm of the ocean. Wake up to the sound of waves, join like-minded travelers for surf sessions led by International Surfing Association (ISA) certified local and foreign surf instructors, and unwind with sunset yoga or live music nights on the rooftop. Whether you’re here to catch your first wave or take your skills to the next level, you’ll find the perfect balance of adventure, relaxation, and community.
From the warm staff and oceanfront views to the strong surf culture and social vibe, The Surfer Beach Camp is where new surfers are made and lifelong memories are born.

surfDays.title: What Your Surf Days Look Like

sections.heading: Sunrise to Soul — Mornings That Move You
body: Your day starts with the sound of waves and the glow of the rising sun over Weligama Bay.

Join a gentle morning yoga session on our rooftop or garden deck to stretch and awaken your body before heading to breakfast. Our meals are freshly prepared, nutritious, and ideal for fueling up before hitting the water.

sections.heading: Surf Lessons with Heart — Mid-Morning Action
body: After breakfast, it’s time to grab your board and walk straight to the beach.

You’ll join your small-group surf lesson led by our experienced, certified instructors. Whether you’re a complete beginner or progressing through intermediate skills, every session is personalized with patience, local knowledge, and the belief that anyone can surf with the right mindset and guidance.

sections.heading: Free Time = Your Time — Afternoons to Explore or Chill
body: After your session, rinse off, refresh, and settle into your afternoon however you choose. Want to relax? Chill at the pool, sunbathe with your new friends, or nap in a hammock. Want to explore? Wander the colorful streets of Weligama, try a local curry spot, or grab a coconut by the beach.
We also organize optional activities like:
list: Wildlife watching or stilt fisherman photo tours

sections.heading: Food, Friends & Firelight — Evenings to Remember
body: When the sun begins to set, the vibe at camp comes alive: game nights, quiz battles, karaoke sessions, theme dinners, movie nights, and epic night outs. Enjoy soulful tunes from local acoustic artists and plenty of daily social activities — there’s always something happening!
This is where you bond with people from all over the world. Solo travelers become friends for life. Surf buddies become family. And every sunset feels a little more special than the last.

sections.heading: Sleep Well. Surf Again.
body: Return to your clean, cozy room and fall asleep to the distant sound of waves. No traffic. No stress. Just rest — because tomorrow is another day to surf, connect, and explore paradise.

chooseSurfCamp.subheading: Weligama is one of Sri Lanka’s top surf towns — ideal for beginners and intermediates. With consistent waves year-round, a fun local vibe, and easy access to neighboring beaches like Midigama and Mirissa, it’s the perfect base for a surf adventure.

campDifference.title: Difference between Beach Camp and TS2 Camp
campDifference.body:
The main differences are location and room standard.

Beach Camp — Right on the beach with a swimming pool. Rooms are standard private rooms with air-conditioning and an ensuite hot-water bathroom.

TS2 Camp — Simple private rooms with a air conditioning and an ensuite hot-water bathroom. Located about 5 minutes from the Beach Camp.

All surf lessons, yoga, dinners, and events take place at the Beach Camp.

We provide a transport compensation of LKR 1,000 per room/dorm per day to travel between the camps.

Spend your day at the Beach Camp and head back to TS2 to sleep.

life.title: Life at The Surfer Beach Camp
life.body:
The Surfer Beach Camp is our flagship location, set right on Weligama Beach with direct access to some of Sri Lanka’s best beginner-friendly waves. This is where surf energy, social connection, and laid-back island living meet.

From sunrise yoga and daily surf lessons to beachfront dinners and rooftop jam sessions, life at The Surfer Beach Camp moves to the rhythm of the ocean. With 6× Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice Awards and a loyal global community, we’re proud to be one of Sri Lanka’s most trusted surf experiences.

Come as a solo traveler, a couple, or a crew of friends — and leave with salty skin, surf skills, and lifelong memories.

aria.section: Why choose The Surfer Surf Camps section

ts2Diff.heading: Our Sri Lanka Surf Camps
paragraphs:
Three camps, one original The Surfer vibe.

Beach Camp and TS2 share all daily activities together, while Soul Surfer operates as an independent camp with its own unique setup and atmosphere.

At the same time, The Surfer signature events such as boat parties, pool parties, and special social nights bring guests from all camps together to share the full community experience.
Beach Camp: oceanfront location with a swimming pool. Standard private rooms and Mixed dormitory with air conditioning and en-suite hot-water bathrooms.

TS2 Camp: offers simple, basic-standard private rooms with air conditioning and hot water ensuite bathrooms. The camp is located just a 5-minute ride from the Beach Camp. Even when you book TS2 Weligama, all surf lessons, yoga sessions, breakfast, dinner, and events take place at the Beach Camp, so you still get the full original The Surfer camp experience. To make travel between the two camps easy, we provide LKR 1,000 per day per bed or per room as travel compensation.

Soul Surfer: an independent retreat with its own dedicated location in Weligama, just a 20-second walk from the beach and 5 minutes walk to the city center. The camp offers a boutique-style experience with upscale private rooms and mixed dormitory rooms, all with ensuite bathrooms. Guests can enjoy a rooftop restaurant and a rooftop infinity pool with panoramic sea views. It has its own daily schedule of surf sessions and activities, running entirely independently while still carrying the original The Surfer camp vibe.
Beach Camp & TS2: all surf lessons, yoga sessions, dinners, and events take place at Beach Camp. You’re welcome to spend the day there and sleep at TS2.
Beach Camp & TS2: we provide LKR 1,000 per room or dorm bed per day as transport compensation between the two camps. Soul Surfer operates independently with its own activities and schedule.

aria.section: Sri Lanka surf camps comparison section

items.question: Is The Surfer Beach Camp Weligama good for beginners?
items.answer: Yes — Weligama Bay is one of the best beginner surf spots in Sri Lanka. The Surfer Beach Camp sits directly on the bay with a gentle sandy bottom, slow rolling whitewater, and zero reef or strong currents. ISA-certified instructors give daily lessons, with soft-top boards included in every surf package.

items.question: What is included in the Beach Camp surf package?
items.answer: Every package includes accommodation, daily breakfast, two surf lessons per day (Mon–Sat), board and rashguard rental, video analysis sessions, and access to the on-site pool and yoga area. Half board (with dinner) and full board options are available — see /rates for the current price list.

items.question: When is the best time to surf at The Surfer Beach Camp Weligama?
items.answer: The south-west coast season runs roughly November through April, with the most consistent waves December to March. Outside that window the bay is still surfable for beginners on most days, but our peak European booking season is the winter months. Water stays around 27–28 °C year-round, so no wetsuit needed.

items.question: How far is Beach Camp from the airport?
items.answer: About 2.5 hours by car from Colombo Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB). We arrange private airport transfers on request — easiest is to add the transfer when you book. Public bus and train options are available but take 4–5 hours.

items.question: Do I need to know how to swim?
items.answer: Yes. All guests must be confident swimmers in open water. Surfing happens in waist-to-chest-deep water near the beach, but you need to be comfortable enough to handle yourself if you fall off the board.

items.question: What's the difference between TS2 Camp and Beach Camp?
items.answer: TS2 is our budget option — same Weligama location, simpler private rooms with AC and ensuite, but a 5-minute shuttle ride from Beach Camp. All surf lessons, yoga sessions, breakfasts, dinners, and events take place AT Beach Camp. You sleep cheaper at TS2, but socialise and surf at Beach Camp with everyone else.

items.question: Is the shuttle between TS2 and Beach Camp included?
items.answer: We compensate transport at LKR 1,000 per room or dorm bed per day — covers tuk-tuks or scooter taxis both ways. The 5-minute ride between the two camps is short and easy, and you can also walk it in about 20 minutes if you prefer.

items.question: Do TS2 guests get the same surf lessons as Beach Camp guests?
items.answer: Yes — identical. Same ISA-certified instructors, same beach, same boards, same group sizes. The only difference is where you sleep at night.

items.question: Are meals served at TS2 Camp?
items.answer: All daily meals (breakfast, optional dinner) are served at Beach Camp, where the kitchen and restaurant are. TS2 is purely accommodation. This is what lets us keep the TS2 price low without compromising the food experience.

items.question: Who is TS2 Camp best for?
items.answer: Solo European travellers and couples on a tighter budget who still want the full surf-camp experience — the same lessons, same crew, same activities — but pay less for their bed at night. If you mostly come back to your room to sleep and shower, TS2 gives you the best value-for-money surf trip in Sri Lanka.

items.question: How is Soul Surfer Camp different from Beach Camp and TS2?
items.answer: Soul Surfer is an independent retreat. Different location in Weligama, own private surf schedule, rooftop infinity pool with sea views, rooftop restaurant, rooftop yoga area. It runs entirely on its own rhythm — separate from the Beach Camp / TS2 daily flow. Built for dedicated surfers who want focus and progression.

items.question: Who is Soul Surfer Camp best for?
items.answer: Intermediate and advanced European surfers who want serious water time without the busier social scene of Beach Camp. Also a great choice for those wanting a more design-led, quieter stay with sea-view yoga and a smaller group atmosphere.

items.question: Is the rooftop infinity pool open to all guests?
items.answer: Yes — every Soul Surfer guest has full access to the rooftop infinity pool, rooftop restaurant, and rooftop yoga area as part of their stay. The whole rooftop is what makes Soul Surfer feel like a retreat rather than just a camp.

items.question: Can Soul Surfer guests join Beach Camp activities?
items.answer: Not by default — Soul Surfer is fully independent with its own surf, yoga, and meal schedule. If you want to drop in on a Beach Camp event (e.g. a boat party or pool party), we can arrange it on a per-event basis. Most Soul Surfer guests prefer the quieter, focused vibe of the retreat.

items.question: Do you offer multi-week stays at Soul Surfer?
items.answer: Yes — many Soul Surfer guests stay 2-4 weeks for serious progression. We offer reduced weekly rates for longer stays and can adjust the surf schedule to your goals (e.g. focused coaching on barrel positioning, paddle fitness, or wave reading). Get in touch via /contact for a custom multi-week quote.

headerTs2.title: The Surfer TS2 Camp Weligama

lifeTs2.title: Life at TS2 Surf Camp
lifeTs2.intro: Our TS2 Weligama surf camp located just 200 meters away from the other side of the bay in Weligama beach and 10 minutes walking away from the city center.
lifeTs2.diffTitle: What is the Difference between Beach Camp and TS2 Camp?
points: Main difference is the location and the room standard
Beach camp is located right next to the beach with a swim pool.
TS2 camp rooms are of basic standard, simple private rooms with a air conditioning and a hot water ensuite bathroom.
Beach camp rooms are Standard private rooms with air conditioning, an ensuite bathroom, and hot water
TS2 camp is located 05 minutes' ride away from the beach camp. Even though you book TS2 Weligama, all your surf lessons, yoga, Breakfast, dinner, and all events will take place at the beach camp

Transport will be paid at 1000 rupees per day per bed and per room to travel between the two camps as a travel compensation! No other surf camp in the area beats our TS2 package rates! You pay less, but still get the full beach camp experience. Sleep comfortably at TS2, best of both worlds, without the high price tag!

lifeSoulSurfer.title: Life at Soul Surfer Camp

With its own dedicated location, rooftop infinity pool overlooking the ocean, and a rooftop restaurant with sea views, the camp runs on its own schedule of surf sessions and daily rhythm — separate from our Beach Camp and TS2.

double.title: Private Double / Twin Room Ensuite

triple.title: Private Triple Room Ensuite

perfect.title: Why Morocco Is Perfect for Surfers

body.p1: Morocco is one of the most diverse surf destinations in the world, offering consistent Atlantic swells, warm hospitality, and rich cultural immersion. From world-class point breaks to beginner-friendly beach breaks, this coast is a playground for surfers of all levels.
body.p2: Taghazout and its surrounding areas have become a surf haven thanks to perfect waves, laid-back lifestyle, and breathtaking desert-meets-ocean views. You’ll enjoy sunny skies, welcoming locals, vibrant souks, and that magical Moroccan energy that makes every surf session feel like an adventure.
body.p3: Even though our camp is just a short walk from the beach, you’re never far from the action. We believe the best surf journeys happen when you balance ocean time with exploration, relaxation, and unforgettable cultural experiences.

chooseSurfCamp2.heading: Why Choose The Surfer Surf Camps?
chooseSurfCamp2.subheading: From the wild Atlantic of Morocco to the warm Indian Ocean of Sri Lanka — built on awards, ISA-certified coaching, beachfront locations, and a global community.

pillars.title: Make Friends For Life
pillars.description: From sunset jams to surfy hangouts, our social vibes bring travelers together — good times, good crew, and friendships that ride beyond the waves.

You can basically spend all ur day at the beach camp and just go for sleep at TS2 camp !

lifeAtSurfStyle.title: Life At The Surfer SurfStyle Camp

body.p1: Perched on the sun-kissed shores of Tamraght, The Surfer Style Camp blends world-class waves, laid-back coastal living, and vibrant community spirit into an unforgettable Moroccan escape. With years of surf hospitality and countless happy guests from around the globe, our camp isn’t just a place to stay — it’s your home by the ocean.
body.p2: Each day flows with the rhythm of the tides. Begin your mornings with the scent of sea air and the call of the waves, then head out for surf sessions guided by experienced local and international instructors. Between surfs, stretch into a relaxing yoga session, soak up the sun on our rooftop, or explore the charm of Tamraght’s coastal paths and bustling markets. Evenings come alive with rooftop sunsets, shared meals, music, and the laughter of newfound friends.
body.p3: From our welcoming team and panoramic sea views to the unique blend of surf culture and Moroccan hospitality, The Surfer Style Camp is where adventures are shared, skills are sharpened, and stories are written in the sand.

stayInStyle.metaTitle: Stay in Style — Shared, Single & Double Rooms | Surf Style Morocco Surf Camp
stayInStyle.title: Stay in Style, the Island Way
stayInStyle.blurb: Whether you're a solo surfer, a beach-loving couple, or a group of wave-chasers — we've got the perfect spot for you. Think breezy rooms, tropical touches, and all the essentials for a chill stay just steps from the sea. Laid-back comfort meets island style — because everyone deserves to sleep easy after a day in the surf.

shared.title: Shared Room
shared.body: Our shared room blends comfort, Moroccan charm, and a friendly camp vibe — perfect for meeting fellow surf travelers and keeping things easy.

single.title: Single Room
single.body: Enjoy your own space in our single room — simple, cozy, and ideal for restful nights after long sessions in the waves.

double.title: Double Room
double.body: Bright and comfortable, the double room is great for two — with relaxed island style and everything you need close to the beach.

surfDays1.title: What Your Surf Days Look Like

morning.title: Sunrise to Soul – Energizing Mornings by the Ocean
morning.body: Start your day with the gentle sound of Atlantic waves and the golden Moroccan sunrise. Enjoy a fresh, healthy breakfast prepared to energize you for the adventures ahead. Some mornings begin with relaxing yoga or gentle stretching, awakening your body and mind before heading to the surf.

lesson.title: Surf Lessons with Heart – Catch the Waves in Tamraght
lesson.body: Fuelled and ready, step onto the warm sand and meet our experienced surf instructors. Each lesson is tailored to your skill level — whether you’re taking your very first lesson or refining advanced techniques. With patient guidance, local knowledge, and world-class surf spots, every session brings you closer to your surfing goals.

freeTime.title: Free Time = Your Time – Explore Morocco or Unwind
freeTime.body: When the surf session ends, the rest of the day is yours. Relax on the terrace, sip mint tea by the ocean, or wander through Tamraght’s charming streets. Feeling adventurous?
activities: Surf spot explorations along Morocco’s coastline
Visits to local souks, villages, and cultural landmarks
Excursions to hidden beaches and scenic viewpoints

evening.title: Food, Friends & Firelight – Evenings Under Moroccan Skies
evening.body: As night falls, our surf camp transforms into a hub of laughter and connection. Share stories over a delicious Moroccan dinner, enjoy BBQ nights, and join in lively games or music sessions. Under the glow of the stars, strangers become friends, and every evening feels unforgettable.

sleep.title: Rest, Recharge & Repeat – Sleep by the Sea
sleep.body: Drift off in a clean, comfortable room with the ocean breeze as your lullaby. Wake up refreshed and ready for another day of surfing, adventure, and unforgettable moments in Morocco.

perfect.title: Why Morocco Is Perfect for Surfers

body.p1: Morocco is one of the most diverse surf destinations in the world, offering consistent Atlantic swells, warm hospitality, and rich cultural immersion. From world-class point breaks to beginner-friendly beach breaks, this coast is a playground for surfers of all levels.
body.p2: Taghazout and its surrounding areas have become a surf haven thanks to perfect waves, laid-back lifestyle, and breathtaking desert-meets-ocean views. You’ll enjoy sunny skies, welcoming locals, vibrant souks, and that magical Moroccan energy that makes every surf session feel like an adventure.
body.p3: Even though our camp is just a short walk from the beach, you’re never far from the action. We believe the best surf journeys happen when you balance ocean time with exploration, relaxation, and unforgettable cultural experiences.

packageTable.title: BOOK YOUR SURF EXPERIENCE
packageTable.subtitle: FOLLOWING INCLUDED IN OUR SURF PACKAGES

surfLessons.name: Surf Lessons
surfLessons.surfAndYoga: 06 Surf Lessons or Guiding Per week / day

items.question: WHAT IS SURF LESSONS PACKAGE LEVEL 1
items.answer:
Our Surf Lessons Package Level 01 is designed for the complete beginners and for those, who have tried surfing before, but wasn’t able to catch waves by themselves. 
 The Surfer Weligama surf camp we guarantee you have chosen the right place to learn and advance your surfing skills as our highly experienced motivated surf instructors determined to get you up and ripping in no time. 
Since we only take 6 people max per instructor for our surf lessons, you are guaranteed personal attention and fast progress.
Also most of the time you will be surfing at our home break – Weligama Surfing Beach – right in front of The Surfer surf camp Sri Lanka, which is less crowded and gives you a hassle free time to learn properly!

items.question: WHAT IS SURF LESSONS PACKAGE LEVEL 02
items.answer:
Our Surf Lessons Package Level 02 is designed for surfers, who can catch waves in the white water, but want to continue to advance their surfing. With us you will learn how to go to the line up, how to catch a green wave properly and how to turn. What’s also important – you’ll learn safety tips and tricks so vital for your progress. This will allow you to move from a beginner to an intermediate surf level with the help of our well experienced surf instructors at The Surfer surf camp in Weligama.
In this package, depending on your surf level and the wave condition, you will have the chance to go to Weligama secret spots by boat as well as other Sri Lanka surfing beaches with our surf instructors to learn.

items.question: WHAT IS SURF GUIDING PACKAGE
items.answer:
Our Surf Guiding Package is created for an experienced surfers, who can surf by themselves, catching and riding green waves with confidence!
If you choose this package, depending on your surf level, we will take you to the best surfing spots in Weligama, Sri Lanka including hidden surf breaks accessible only by boat. Also you’ll be given safety instruction and guided on particular features of each surfing beach.
Both of our surf camps in Weligama, Sri Lanka located within ten minutes ride to all the best surf spots such as Midigama lazy left and lazy right, plantation surf spot, coconut surf spot, Rams surf break and many more. You can discover all of these surf spots around Weligama with our well experienced surf guides who work at our Weligama surf camps and know local surf scene very well.

items.question: WHAT IS SURF AND YOGA PACKAGE
items.answer:
Surf and Yoga Package is designed for those, who would like to add yoga to their surfing holiday as a great way to stretch and relax their tired muscles after the whole day surfing as well as to find peace of mind at our sunrise or sunset sessions.
Yoga lessons are conducted by certified yoga instructors in beautiful open air rooftop studio with stunning ocean view.
This will be a great addition to your overall experience of what our surf and yoga camp in Weligama, Sri Lanka has to offer.

items.question: WHAT ELSE AFTER A GREAT SURF SESSION
items.answer:
• Taste our well cooked delicious food and drinks at The Surfer Weligama rooftop restaurant
• Sunbathe or read a book by our surf camp swimming pool
• Grab a beer and hang out with other surfers in our famous rooftop restaurant and bar in Weligama
• Join our party bus, which will take you to the best beach parties on the South of the island, which can be reached within 10 to 20 minute ride
• Enjoy our daily social events
• Rent a scooter or tuk tuk from us and discover the beauty of the island

items.question: HOW TO GET TO OUR PLACE FROM THE AIRPORT
items.answer:
We can provide airport pick up and drop off for your convenience. Let us know your flight details and we will arrange an airport pick up accordingly. The driver will meet you at the airport.
Our drivers will take you through the highway to reach our place faster avoiding the major traffic jams on the sea road. This journey will take approximately 2 to 3 hours to get to our surf camp in Weligama depending on traffic.
